summary: PP leads PSOE by ~3-4pp in polls as of late Sept 2025, down from ~6pp earlier. Vox rising at PP's expense is narrowing the gap.
content: Politico Poll of Polls: PP 34.2%, PSOE 30.2% (4pp gap). TheLocal article from Sep 11 reports gap narrowed to 3pp, "half that of the last poll." PP at 30.7%. Vox surge eating into PP support. PSOE still widely expected to lose next election. 305 forecasters on Metaculus question, CP at exactly 5.00%.
